page.title: Template:Country data Republic of the Congo

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23367905411|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Republic of the Congo | shortname alias = Congo | flag alias = Flag of the Republic of the Congo.svg | flag alias-1970 = Flag of the People's Republic of the Congo.svg | link alias-military = Armed Forces of the Republic of the Congo | link alias-air force = Congolese Air Force | link alias-basketball = Republic of the Congo {{{mw}}} national {{{age|}}} basketball team | link alias-volleyball = Republic of the Congo {{{mw}}} national {{{age|}}} volleyball team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | hatnote = {{Redirect|Template:Country data Congo|the neighboring country|Template:Country data Democratic Republic of the Congo}} | var1 = 1970 | redir1 = COG | redir2 = CGO | redir3 = Congo, Republic of the | redir4 = Congo | redir5 = Congo-Brazzaville | related1 = Democratic Republic of the Congo | related2 = People's Republic of the Congo | cat = Congo republic </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Republic_of_the_Congo here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Republic_of_the_Congo for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Republic of the Congo | shortname alias = Congo | flag alias = Flag of the Republic of the Congo.svg | flag alias-1970 = Flag of the People's Republic of the Congo.svg | link alias-military = Armed Forces of the Republic of the Congo | link alias-air force = Congolese Air Force | link alias-basketball = Republic of the Congo {{{mw}}} national {{{age|}}} basketball team | link alias-volleyball = Republic of the Congo {{{mw}}} national {{{age|}}} volleyball team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | hatnote = {{Redirect|Template:Country data Congo|the neighboring country|Template:Country data Democratic Republic of the Congo}} | var1 = 1970 | redir1 = COG | redir2 = CGO | redir3 = Congo, Republic of the | redir4 = Congo | redir5 = Congo-Brazzaville | related1 = Democratic Republic of the Congo | related2 = People's Republic of the Congo | cat = Congo republic </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
